summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Odapto Kanban-based work management SaaS. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core features mostly functional with session management issues affecting authenticated user flows.

ui_bugs.issue: Users get logged out frequently during navigation, session doesn't persist properly
Overlay interception preventing clicks in workspace creation modal

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete workspace creation due to session timeout and modal click issues
Cannot test board creation and Kanban features due to session management problems

passed_tests: User registration via API and UI
Landing page loads with Odapto branding
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management issue - users are getting logged out during navigation. The backend authentication works perfectly, but frontend session persistence is broken. This blocks testing of workspace creation, board functionality, and Kanban drag-drop features.
